title: Test decompose --no-compose flag behavior
description: Verify that `kody decompose --no-compose` stops after parallel builds, saves decompose-state.json, skips merge/verify/review/ship phases, creates no PR, and pushes sub-task branches to remote. The task description contains a copy-paste error referencing T25's notification system which is unrelated to this test.

existing_patterns.description: kody workflow orchestrates decompose command via kody-engine CLI with issue_comment trigger
decompose agent prompt defines sub-task decomposition logic with max 4 sub-tasks
autoCompose flag derived from !input.noCompose — controls whether Phase 3 auto-compose runs after parallel builds
decomposeState saved to decompose-state.json after parallel build phase completes
